name: Iso11783OPEnableObject
title: Iso11783OPEnableObject
syntax: long Iso11783OPEnableObject( dword ecuHandle, dword objectID, dword enable );
description: The function activates or deactivates an input object. A Enable Object command is sent to the Virtual Terminal.

parameters.name: ecuHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the ECU (must be created with Iso11783CreateECU)
